title: mass produced eva series
wikitext:
[]: mass produced eva series             Quote Post by BardialX18 » Wed Jul 16, 2008 4:26 am ok, am I the only one who thought the mass produced eva's heads were gay as hell looking? oh wow a big mouth. couldnt they have been given like unit 03's or 04's head? or even anything remotely evangelion/robotic looking?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Jul 16, 2008 4:33 am They were fucking freaky Really, really fucking freaky

[]:             Quote Post by BardialX18 » Wed Jul 16, 2008 4:35 am exactly they were messed up. they just looked really gay. I mean the wings were tight and the swords were sick as fuck, but the heads just ruined them all.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Jul 16, 2008 4:38 am huh? I think their head design was brilliant. Really abnormal and horrendous. The fact they had red, fat lips just made them even more disturbing, not gay by any means

[]:             Quote Post by BardialX18 » Wed Jul 16, 2008 4:40 am but they didnt even appear remotely eva looking, maybe they werent the worst concept but it could have been so much better in my opinion.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jul 16, 2008 4:44 am I thought they kinda looked like Giger's aliens, only white and more smoothed out. There definately is something androgynously sexual about them though that creeps me out when they smile.

[]:             Quote Post by BardialX18 » Wed Jul 16, 2008 4:48 am i suppose thats true, and Shinji did have that weird shower scene with kaworu, and on the mass produced eva's entry plug was kaworu's name. so who knows maybe they were designed to create an odd uneasy sexual feeling.

[]:             Quote Post by Rhyno » Wed Jul 16, 2008 4:51 am BardialX18 wrote: but they didnt even appear remotely eva looking

[]:             Quote Post by BardialX18 » Wed Jul 16, 2008 4:57 am I guess that also works, they were creepy especially when they developed all those Rei faces on their Rei face

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Wed Jul 16, 2008 5:01 am The Harpies only remind me of some pervert, erotic, lewd, amorous and insane creatures which produce a lot of saliva, as if they hadn't had any food the week prior to their deployment. SEELE must have been starving them. Sorry to go off topic, but I'd really like to ask the Harpies how an Eva Unit tastes like. To me it looks like tuna sashimi.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 16, 2008 8:23 am They weren't very cool looking, I'll agree to that, but what they lacked in cool, they made up for in pure creepy weirdness.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Wed Jul 16, 2008 8:54 am Actually, the MP Evas look very Eva-like, sans armor. After all, Evas are humanoids, not mechas. I think the MP Evas were designed (note that whenever I refer to design, I'm talking about the real life artists, not the manufacturers in the movie) to look more feral and more wild than the standard Evas. This is reflected in their actions and mannerisms as well; the hissing noises they make, the pack mentality, and the scavenger-like behavior in the end all give support to this. So why do the heads look so strange? I think it's to appeal to a more primal level of fear/disgust in people. If your enemy is a massive, machine-like creature, you'll probably think, "Yeah, I'm screwed. Bummer." If it's some monster that's just maniacally grinning at you, there's that deeper fear of "I have no idea what's going to happen. I'm probably going to die horribly, and this thing is going to enjoy every minute of it." Given the choice between having to deal with some deliberate, preprogrammed machine and having to face an unstable, grinning animal, I'd definitely have to go with the former.

[]:             Quote Post by Tetsu Aero » Wed Jul 16, 2008 11:30 am yeah just like gamer say, they where ment to give fear to insecure peps

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 16, 2008 11:47 am The Harpies might be gay, but you're just thinking about the wrong team: http://www.evacommentary.org/images_capdoc/reichu_naughty-harpy_pr0n.jpg ;) On a more series note, I believe the harpies ARE meant to look as freaky as hell.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Wed Jul 16, 2008 12:58 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: The Harpies might be gay, but you're just thinking about the wrong team: http://www.evacommentary.org/images_capdoc/reichu_naughty-harpy_pr0n.jpg ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 16, 2008 1:13 pm Blame Reichu, there's more where that came from. http://www.evacommentary.org/images_capdoc/reichu_naughty-harpy_getdown.jpg http://www.evacommentary.org/images_capdoc/reichu_naughty-harpy_makeout.jpg http://www.evacommentary.org/images_capdoc/reichu_naughty-harpy_pr0n.jpg http://www.evacommentary.org/images_capdoc/reichu_naughty-harpy_ohcrap.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Wed Jul 16, 2008 2:22 pm Where's that image that compared the Mass Produced Eva series to Pistachio nuts?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Jul 16, 2008 2:36 pm Xard wrote: They were fucking freaky Really, really fucking freaky

[]:             Quote Post by BardialX18 » Wed Jul 16, 2008 2:51 pm yeah I figured that one on my own.
